steps.t: The first milestone is along the road west of Emyn Lûm. Lomdognir laid out a specific route he needs you to take with the message you are carrying.
The second milestone lies further along the road west of Emyn Lûm. Lomdognir laid out a specific route he needs you to take with the message you are c…
The third milestone lies along the road where it turns north towards the abandoned village in Dourstocks. Lomdognir laid out a specific route he needs…
Laeginn is stationed in the inn at Audaghaim in the Dourstocks. Lomdognir has instructed you to hand the message over to the Elf Laeginn.
